Entries.description: Lists the geofence collections that exist in your Amazon Web Services account.

NextToken.description: A pagination token indicating there are additional pages available. You can use the token in a following request to fetch the next set of results.

Entries.description: Contains API key resources in your Amazon Web Services account. Details include API key name, allowed referers and timestamp for when the API key will expire.

NextToken.description: A pagination token indicating there are additional pages available. You can use the token in a following request to fetch the next set of results.

Entries.description: Contains a list of maps in your Amazon Web Services account

NextToken.description: A pagination token indicating there are additional pages available. You can use the token in a following request to fetch the next set of results.

Entries.description: Lists the place index resources that exist in your Amazon Web Services account

NextToken.description: A pagination token indicating that there are additional pages available. You can use the token in a new request to fetch the next page of results.

Entries.description: Lists the route calculator resources that exist in your Amazon Web Services account

NextToken.description: A pagination token indicating there are additional pages available. You can use the token in a subsequent request to fetch the next set of results.

Entries.description: Contains tracker resources in your Amazon Web Services account. Details include tracker name, description and timestamps for when the tracker was created and last updated.

NextToken.description: A pagination token indicating there are additional pages available. You can use the token in a following request to fetch the next set of results.

CollectionArn.description:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the geofence collection resource. Used when you need to specify a resource across all Amazon Web Services.

  • Format example: arn:aws:geo:region:account-id:geofence-collection/ExampleGeofenceCollection

Description.description: The optional description for the geofence collection.

PricingPlanDataSource.description: No longer used. Always returns an empty string.

KmsKeyId.description: A key identifier for an Amazon Web Services KMS customer managed key assigned to the Amazon Location resource

Tags.description: Displays the key, value pairs of tags associated with this resource.

CreateTime.description: The timestamp for when the geofence resource was created in ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ

UpdateTime.description: The timestamp for when the geofence collection was last updated in ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ

GeofenceCount.description: The number of geofences in the geofence collection.

Key.description: The key value/string of an API key.

KeyArn.description:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the API key resource. Used when you need to specify a resource across all Amazon Web Services.

  • Format example: arn:aws:geo:region:account-id:key/ExampleKey

KeyName.description: The name of the API key resource.

Restrictions.description: API Restrictions on the allowed actions, resources, and referers for an API key resource.

CreateTime.description: The timestamp for when the API key resource was created in ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ.

ExpireTime.description: The timestamp for when the API key resource will expire in ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ.

UpdateTime.description: The timestamp for when the API key resource was last updated in ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ.

Description.description: The optional description for the API key resource.

Tags.description: Tags associated with the API key resource.

MapName.description: The map style selected from an available provider.

MapArn.description:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the map resource. Used to specify a resource across all Amazon Web Services.

  • Format example: arn:aws:geo:region:account-id:map/ExampleMap

DataSource.description: Specifies the data provider for the associated map tiles.

Configuration.description: Specifies the map tile style selected from a partner data provider.

Description.description: The optional description for the map resource.

CreateTime.description: The timestamp for when the map resource was created in ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ.

UpdateTime.description: The timestamp for when the map resource was last update in ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ.

IndexName.description: The name of the place index resource being described.

IndexArn.description:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the place index resource. Used to specify a resource across Amazon Web Services.

  • Format example: arn:aws:geo:region:account-id:place-index/ExamplePlaceIndex

Description.description: The optional description for the place index resource.

CreateTime.description: The timestamp for when the place index resource was created in ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ.

UpdateTime.description: The timestamp for when the place index resource was last updated in ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ.

DataSource.description:
The data provider of geospatial data. Values can be one of the following:

  • Esri

  • Grab

  • Here

For more information about data providers, see Amazon Location Service data providers.

DataSourceConfiguration.description: The specified data storage option for requesting Places.

CalculatorName.description: The name of the route calculator resource being described.

CalculatorArn.description:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the Route calculator resource. Use the ARN when you specify a resource across Amazon Web Services.

  • Format example: arn:aws:geo:region:account-id:route-calculator/ExampleCalculator

Description.description: The optional description of the route calculator resource.

CreateTime.description:
The timestamp when the route calculator resource was created in ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ.

  • For example, 2020–07-2T12:15:20.000Z+01:00

UpdateTime.description:
The timestamp when the route calculator resource was last updated in ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ.

  • For example, 2020–07-2T12:15:20.000Z+01:00

DataSource.description:
The data provider of traffic and road network data. Indicates one of the available providers:

  • Esri

  • Grab

  • Here

For more information about data providers, see Amazon Location Service data providers.

TrackerArn.description:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the tracker resource. Used when you need to specify a resource across all Amazon Web Services.

  • Format example: arn:aws:geo:region:account-id:tracker/ExampleTracker

Description.description: The optional description for the tracker resource.

PricingPlanDataSource.description: No longer used. Always returns an empty string.

Tags.description: The tags associated with the tracker resource.

CreateTime.description: The timestamp for when the tracker resource was created in ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ.

UpdateTime.description: The timestamp for when the tracker resource was last updated in ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ.

KmsKeyId.description: A key identifier for an Amazon Web Services KMS customer managed key assigned to the Amazon Location resource.

PositionFiltering.description: The position filtering method of the tracker resource.

EventBridgeEnabled.description: Whether UPDATE events from this tracker in EventBridge are enabled. If set to true these events will be sent to EventBridge.

KmsKeyEnableGeospatialQueries.description:
Enables GeospatialQueries for a tracker that uses a Amazon Web Services KMS customer managed key.

This parameter is only used if you are using a KMS customer managed key.

If you wish to encrypt your data using your own KMS customer managed key, then the Bounding Polygon Queries feature will be disabled by default. This is because by using this feature, a representation of your device positions will not be encrypted using the your KMS managed key. The exact device position, however; is still encrypted using your managed key.

You can choose to opt-in to the Bounding Polygon Quseries feature. This is done by setting the KmsKeyEnableGeospatialQueries parameter to true when creating or updating a Tracker.

SampleTime.description: The timestamp at which the device's position was determined. Uses ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ.

ReceivedTime.description: The timestamp for when the tracker resource received the device position. Uses ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ.

DevicePositions.description: Contains the position history details for the requested device.

NextToken.description: A pagination token indicating there are additional pages available. You can use the token in a following request to fetch the next set of results.

Geometry.description: Contains the geofence geometry details describing the position of the geofence. Can be a circle, a polygon, or a multipolygon.

Status.description:
Identifies the state of the geofence. A geofence will hold one of the following states:

  • ACTIVE — The geofence has been indexed by the system.

  • PENDING — The geofence is being processed by the system.

  • FAILED — The geofence failed to be indexed by the system.

  • DELETED — The geofence has been deleted from the system index.

  • DELETING — The geofence is being deleted from the system index.

CreateTime.description: The timestamp for when the geofence collection was created in ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ

UpdateTime.description: The timestamp for when the geofence collection was last updated in ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ

GeofenceProperties.description:
User defined properties of the geofence. A property is a key-value pair stored with the geofence and added to any geofence event triggered with that geofence.

Format: "key" : "value"

ContentType.description: The map glyph content type. For example, application/octet-stream.

CacheControl.description: The HTTP Cache-Control directive for the value.

Blob.description: Contains the body of the sprite sheet or JSON offset ﬁle.

ContentType.description: The content type of the sprite sheet and offsets. For example, the sprite sheet content type is image/png, and the sprite offset JSON document is application/json.

CacheControl.description: The HTTP Cache-Control directive for the value.

Blob.description: Contains the body of the style descriptor.

ContentType.description: The style descriptor's content type. For example, application/json.

CacheControl.description: The HTTP Cache-Control directive for the value.

ContentType.description: The map tile's content type. For example, application/vnd.mapbox-vector-tile.

CacheControl.description: The HTTP Cache-Control directive for the value.

Place.description: Details about the result, such as its address and position.

Entries.description: Contains details about each device's last known position.

NextToken.description: A pagination token indicating there are additional pages available. You can use the token in a following request to fetch the next set of results.

Entries.description: Contains a list of geofences stored in the geofence collection.

NextToken.description: A pagination token indicating there are additional pages available. You can use the token in a following request to fetch the next set of results.

Tags.description:
Tags that have been applied to the specified resource. Tags are mapped from the tag key to the tag value: "TagKey" : "TagValue".

  • Format example: {"tag1" : "value1", "tag2" : "value2"}

ConsumerArns.description: Contains the list of geofence collection ARNs associated to the tracker resource.

NextToken.description: A pagination token indicating there are additional pages available. You can use the token in a following request to fetch the next set of results.

Summary.description: Contains a summary of the request. Echoes the input values for Position, Language, MaxResults, and the DataSource of the place index.

Results.description: Returns a list of Places closest to the specified position. Each result contains additional information about the Places returned.

Summary.description: Contains a summary of the request. Echoes the input values for BiasPosition, FilterBBox, FilterCountries, Language, MaxResults, and Text. Also includes the DataSource of the place index.

Results.description: A list of place suggestions that best match the search text.

Summary.description: Contains a summary of the request. Echoes the input values for BiasPosition, FilterBBox, FilterCountries, Language, MaxResults, and Text. Also includes the DataSource of the place index and the bounding box, ResultBBox, which surrounds the search results.

Results.description:
A list of Places matching the input text. Each result contains additional information about the specific point of interest.

Not all response properties are included with all responses. Some properties may only be returned by specific data partners.
